bits.name: iatu_func_bypass_func_num_match_en
bits.comment: In outbound: func_bypass In inbound: func_num_match_en

bits.name: iatu_dma_bypass_fuzzy_type_match_mode
bits.comment: In outbound: dma_bypass In inbound: fuzzy_type_match_mode

bits.name: iatu_inbound_match_mode
bits.comment: Only in inbound region. 0: address match mode, 1: bar match mode
